name: NOC AI SQL Agent V3.9 Phase1 Hardened

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $json;
const q = String(j.chatInput || '').trim();

const systemPrompt = `
You are a telecom NOC request classifier.
Return ONLY one raw JSON object with no markdown.

Allowed keys only:
mode, intent, category, vendor, region_input, office_input, geo_type, technology, networktype, severity,
sitedownflag, sitepoweroff, acknowledged, isvip, domain, sitecode,
request_profile, analysis_scope, anchor_type, requested_blocks, count_only, user_question

Allowed mode: incident, complaint, performance, reporting, free_chat, unknown
Allowed geo_type: region, office, site, none
Allowed request_profile: simple_query, site_incident_summary, free_chat, placeholder

Incident is highest priority.

Intent shortlist:
site_down_count
site_down_list
power_alarm_summary
tx_alarm_summary
vip_down_sites
site_active_alarms
site_incident_summary
down_aging_summary
power_aging_summary
down_parked_summary
power_parked_summary
placeholder_request
free_chat

Category shortlist:
SITE_DOWN
POWER
TX
CELL_DOWN
""

Rules:
- "How many" + site down => site_down_count + SITE_DOWN + count_only=true + sitedownflag=Yes
- list/show down sites => site_down_list + SITE_DOWN + sitedownflag=Yes
- power alarms => power_alarm_summary + POWER
- tx alarms/transport/microwave/mpls => tx_alarm_summary + TX
- VIP down => vip_down_sites + SITE_DOWN + isvip=Yes + sitedownflag=Yes
- aging + down => down_aging_summary + SITE_DOWN + sitedownflag=Yes
- aging + power => power_aging_summary + POWER
- parked + down => down_parked_summary + SITE_DOWN + sitedownflag=Yes
- parked + power => power_parked_summary + POWER
- "warning" + down => down_aging_summary + SITE_DOWN + sitedownflag=Yes
- "critical" + down => down_aging_summary + SITE_DOWN + sitedownflag=Yes
- "warning" + power => power_aging_summary + POWER
- "critical" + power => power_aging_summary + POWER
- active alarms on a specific site => site_active_alarms
- analyze/status/incident/details for specific site => site_incident_summary + request_profile=site_incident_summary
- if user asks full incident or incident analysis without site code => placeholder_request + request_profile=placeholder + requested_blocks=need_site_for_incident
- unsupported performance/reporting/future request => placeholder_request + request_profile=placeholder
- greeting/thanks => free_chat
- If region mentioned => geo_type=region and put value in region_input
- If office mentioned => geo_type=office and put value in office_input
- If site code mentioned => geo_type=site and put value in sitecode
- Never use null. Use empty string for missing values.
`;

const userPrompt = `User question: ${q}`;
return [{ json: { ...j, systemPrompt, userPrompt } }];

const original = $items('INT_Extract Message')[0]?.json || {};
const chainOut = $json.text || $json.response || $json.output || '';
let parsed = {};
try { parsed = JSON.parse(chainOut); } catch (e) { parsed = {}; }
return [{
  json: {
    mode: String(parsed.mode || '').trim(),
    intent: String(parsed.intent || '').trim(),
    category: String(parsed.category || '').trim(),
    vendor: String(parsed.vendor || '').trim(),
    region_input: String(parsed.region_input || '').trim(),
    office_input: String(parsed.office_input || '').trim(),
    geo_type: String(parsed.geo_type || '').trim(),
    technology: String(parsed.technology || '').trim(),
    networktype: String(parsed.networktype || '').trim(),
    severity: String(parsed.severity || '').trim(),
    sitedownflag: String(parsed.sitedownflag || '').trim(),
    sitepoweroff: String(parsed.sitepoweroff || '').trim(),
    acknowledged: String(parsed.acknowledged || '').trim(),
    isvip: String(parsed.isvip || '').trim(),
    domain: String(parsed.domain || '').trim(),
    sitecode: String(parsed.sitecode || '').trim(),
    request_profile: String(parsed.request_profile || '').trim(),
    analysis_scope: String(parsed.analysis_scope || '').trim(),
    anchor_type: String(parsed.anchor_type || '').trim(),
    requested_blocks: String(parsed.requested_blocks || '').trim(),
    count_only: parsed.count_only === true || String(parsed.count_only || '').toLowerCase() === 'true',
    user_question: String(parsed.user_question || original.chatInput || '').trim(),
    debugMode: !!original.debugMode,
    _aiRaw: chainOut
  }
}];
